summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 22/05/2023
DCE iron ore futures market falling sharply trends by 2.65%. the main contract I2309 closed 716. some traderswere negative to sell, Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high.
